title: VKTX Stock Forecast 2025–2026: Can Viking Therapeutics' Obesity Drug Pipeline Double the Share Price?
text: Wall Street's consensus one-year price target for VKTX stands at $93.59, more than 170% above its current price, reflecting strong confidence in the company's pipeline. More aggressive targets exist, with Raymond James maintaining a Strong Buy rating with a $118 target, implying 287% upside from current levels. The obesity drug market is intensely competitive, with Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk already having entrenched franchises and developing new oral and multi-agonist drugs that may match or exceed VK2735's efficacy. Novo Nordisk secured FDA approval for the pill version of Wegovy with expected launch at $149 per month for patients without insurance. Eli Lilly submitted a regulatory filing seeking approval for its oral obesity candidate orforglipron, setting the stage for a potential launch in 2026. In clinical trials, VK2735's injectable formulation achieved an average weight loss of up to 14.7% in just 13 weeks. For the oral formulation, VK2735 produced statistically significant, dose-dependent weight loss up to 12.2% (26.6 lbs), with early, progressive reductions from Week 1 and a generally favorable tolerability profile. While Phase 3 obesity trials are long, expensive and unforgiving, VK2735's profile supports strong investor enthusiasm. The company maintains a $603-706 million cash position, providing funding through clinical catalysts into 2028.
